_documentation.description: Comprehensive scoring configuration for DSLD supplement scoring system - 100% config-driven
_documentation.total_points: 80 calculated server-side (A+B+C+D), 20 user profile on device = 100 total
_documentation.author: PharmaGuide Team
changelog: 3.4.0: Enhanced Section C with evidence hierarchy (product > branded > ingredient > strain > preclinical), multipliers aligned with EFSA/GRADE/NatMed/Examine standards
3.3.1: Fixed CFU extraction (billion_count from probiotic_blends), implemented physician/sustainability scoring
3.3.0: Fixed double-counting (removed full_disclosure +2), violation cap -25 → -20, clinical_strains +2 → +3
3.2.0: Added detailed_breakdown output, synergy tiers, weighted evidence, enhanced probiotic bonus
3.1.0: Added penalty caps, deduplication, Section B ceiling fix

_important_rules.no_double_counting: A bonus/penalty should only apply ONCE. If absence of X avoids penalty, don't also give bonus for 'having no X'.
_important_rules.config_driven: ALL point values must come from this config. NO hardcoded numbers in Python code.
_important_rules.every_subcategory_appears: All subcategories must appear in output, even if score is 0 or N/A.

section_maximums._comment: Maximum points per section. A+B+C+D can exceed 80 but ceiling cap of 80 is applied.
section_maximums._E_note: Section E calculated on device, not in this script
section_maximums._total_note: Ceiling cap at 80 (A+B+C+D theoretical max is 98 but capped). Section E (20 pts) calculated on device.

A1_bioavailability_form.name: Bioavailability & Form Quality
A1_bioavailability_form._floor_note: Multivitamins use floor of 0.7 to avoid penalizing diverse formulas

A2_premium_forms.name: Multiple Premium Forms
A2_premium_forms._threshold_note: Forms with bio_score > 12 count as premium

A3_delivery_system.name: Enhanced Delivery System
A3_delivery_system._note: Actual matching done against data/enhanced_delivery.json (38 systems)
A3_delivery_system._tier_4_note: No tier 4 in enhanced_delivery.json - unmatched products get 0 pts

A4_absorption_enhancer.name: Absorption Enhancer Present
A4_absorption_enhancer._qualification: Enhancer present AND enhanced nutrient present
A4_absorption_enhancer._note: Award once only, even if multiple enhancers present

synergy_clusters.name: Synergy Clusters
synergy_clusters._note: Based on number of ingredients in matching cluster
synergy_clusters._calculation: Award highest cluster tier only, not cumulative

section_B_safety_purity._structure: Start at 45, subtract penalties, add bonuses (floor at 0, ceiling at 45)

harmful_additives.name: Harmful Additives
harmful_additives._cap_note: Total additive penalties capped at -5 to avoid over-penalization

deduplication._method: Deduplicate by additive_id before applying penalties
deduplication._example: Magnesium Stearate + Stearic Acid = 1 penalty (same ADD_STEARIC_ACID)

batch_traceability.name: Batch Traceability / COA
batch_traceability._note: COA available, QR code, or lookup system

scaling._method: Scale by hidden ratio (proprietary ingredients / total active)

clinical_evidence_mitigation._note: Reduce proprietary blend penalty when clinical evidence validates the formulation
clinical_evidence_mitigation._rationale: Per Labdoor/ConsumerLab methodology: only poorly-supported blends get full penalty. Clinically-validated formulations are protecting IP, not deceiving consumers.
clinical_evidence_mitigation._probiotic_note: 50% reduction for probiotic blends with clinically documented strains (K12, LGG, Reuteri, etc.)
clinical_evidence_mitigation._herbal_note: 40% reduction for herbal blends with tier_1/tier_2 clinical evidence (RCTs, meta-analyses)
clinical_evidence_mitigation._standardized_note: 30% reduction for blends containing standardized botanical extracts (guaranteed potency)

section_C_evidence_research._methodology: Evidence hierarchy aligned with EFSA, Natural Medicines (TRC), GRADE (NIH/WHO), and Examine.com frameworks

evidence_hierarchy._description: Points awarded based on evidence type and proximity to actual product. Multiplier applied to base points.

product_level._description: Clinical trials on the exact finished product formulation (gold standard per EFSA/NatMed)
product_level._bonus_note: +2 bonus if exact product has published RCT (rewards innovation like Seed DS-01)

branded_ingredient._description: Patented/branded ingredient with its own clinical trials (e.g., KSM-66, Meriva, Longvida)
branded_ingredient._multiplier_note: Per GRADE indirectness principle - branded is one step removed from product

ingredient_human._description: Generic ingredient studies in humans (e.g., 'vitamin D', 'magnesium' - any form)
ingredient_human._multiplier_note: Good evidence but not specific to product formulation

strain_level_probiotic._description: Individual probiotic strain evidence - strain-specific but NOT product-specific
strain_level_probiotic._rationale: Per Frontiers 2018 meta-analysis: efficacy is strain-specific AND formulation-specific. Multi-strain combo may differ from individual strain studies.
strain_level_probiotic._multiplier_note: Strain evidence is valuable but doesn't guarantee product combo works identically

preclinical._description: Animal, in vitro, or mechanistic studies only - weak predictive value for humans
preclinical._multiplier_note: Per Examine: preclinical rarely predicts human efficacy

scoring_rules._cap_per_ingredient_note: No single ingredient contributes >5 pts - prevents one well-studied vitamin from maxing score
scoring_rules._cap_total_note: Section C max is 15 - enforced with min(sum, 15)
scoring_rules._consistency_note: Deduct 1 pt if evidence for ingredient is mixed/inconsistent (per Examine methodology)

legacy_tier_mapping._note: Maps old evidence_level values to new hierarchy for backward compatibility

unsubstantiated_claims.name: Unsubstantiated Claims Penalty
unsubstantiated_claims._note: Apply once only if product makes health claims without supporting evidence

section_D_brand_trust._max_note: Was 10, now 8 after removing full_disclosure (+2 double-counting)

top_manufacturer.name: Top-Tier Manufacturer
top_manufacturer._note: Matched to top manufacturers list (Thorne, NOW, Jarrow, etc.)

_full_disclosure_removed._reason: REMOVED - Double counting. Absence of proprietary blend already rewarded by not getting -15 penalty in B4.

manufacturer_violations.name: Manufacturer Violations (Last 10y)
manufacturer_violations._cap_rationale: Class I toxic = -20 base; with -20 cap, worst offenders get 80/100 or lower = 'Concerning' or 'High Risk'

probiotic_bonus._note: Probiotic bonus can push score above 80 temporarily, final cap at 80 applied after

clinical_strains.name: Contains Clinically Studied Strains
clinical_strains._rationale: Clinically proven strains are rare and valuable - worth higher reward

survivability_coating.name: Survivability Coating/Technology
survivability_coating._note: Delayed-release, enteric coating, or patented delivery

score_floors_and_ceilings._comment: Prevent extreme scores that don't reflect reality
score_floors_and_ceilings._floor_note: No product scores below 10/80 - even worst products have some value
score_floors_and_ceilings._ceiling_note: Maximum 80/80 (Section E adds up to 20 on device)
score_floors_and_ceilings._probiotic_note: Probiotic bonus added to raw score, then ceiling applied
